p2p_enrichment.notes: Added 7 repo CI/CD pass_to_pass gates: test_repo_oxlint (oxlint --type-aware), test_repo_plugins_unit (vitest unit tests for src/plugins/), test_repo_contracts (vitest contracts tests), test_repo_format_check (oxfmt on tools.ts), test_repo_bundled_plugin_metadata, test_repo_bundled_provider_auth, test_repo_no_conflict_markers. CI commands discovered from package.json scripts and .github/workflows/ci.yml. Excluded: tsc --noEmit (OOMs), gateway tests (pre-existing failures), full test suite (too slow).

validate.notes: Docker build OK. NOP test reward=0 (3 f2p tests fail as expected on base). Gold test reward=1 (all 18 tests pass after solve.sh). Rubric judge requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (returns 0.5 without key - infrastructure limitation not a task issue). Task structure is valid.
